testcase.name: test_negative_amount
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration25.py:86: in test_negative_amount assert r.status_code in (400, 422), f"expected err, got {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: expected err, got 200 {"group_code":"B01","campers_updated":15,"campers_failed":0,"amount_per_camper":-3,"total_balls_issued":-45} E assert 200 in (400, 422) E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
